preview_text:
The model rates Ivory Coast as clear favorites with a 61% win probability, while Curaçao's path to victory stands at just 14%. The underdog's modest chance reflects a substantial gap between the two forecasts.

The draw emerges as a meaningful outcome at 26%, the second-most likely result. This relatively elevated draw probability suggests the match may prove competitive in stretches despite Ivory Coast's advantage. The 47-percentage-point gap from favorite to underdog indicates Ivory Coast enters as heavy favorites, yet the three-way split carries enough uncertainty that a stalemate or upset carries non-trivial probability.

The model and sportsbooks diverge meaningfully on the favorite. Books assign Ivory Coast 72% compared to the model's 61%, a gap of 11 percentage points. Conversely, books price Curaçao's chances at 10% versus the model's 14%. The draw probability also widens notably: 26% from the model versus 18% from consensus. These differences suggest the market views Ivory Coast's superiority as larger than the statistical model does. The dashboard does not determine which assessment proves more accurate.
